description: A record that represents the funding / donations configuration for a given bumicert. It shares the same rkey as the claim.activity (bumicert) record.

evmLinkRef.description: Reference to an EVM wallet link record (app.gainforest.link.evm).

main.description: The funding / donations configuration for a given bumicert.

receivingWallet.description: Reference to the wallet link record where funds should be received. Open union to support future wallet types (e.g. Solana, Cosmos).

goalInUSD.description: An optional field to set a fundraising goal in USD (e.g. '1000.50').

minDonationInUSD.description: Optional minimum donation amount in USD (e.g. '1.00'). Donations below this amount will be rejected.

maxDonationInUSD.description: Optional maximum donation amount in USD (e.g. '10000.00'). Donations above this amount will be rejected.

allowOversell.description: An optional field to determine if donations are accepted post the goal reach. Defaults to true (overselling is allowed).

status.description: The current status of the listing. Defaults to 'open'.

updatedAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was last updated.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
